MODULE: cosmos.secrets.aws_secrets
FILE: cosmos/secrets/aws_secrets.py (456 lines)
CATEGORY: secrets

DESCRIPTION: cosmos AWS Secrets Manager Integration

"Amazon has secrets? I thought they just had packages!"

AWS Secrets Manager for cloud-native secrets management.

CLASSES:
- AWSSecretsProvider(SecretsProvider): AWS Secrets Manager provider.

Features:
- Secret CRUD operations
- Automatic ro
  Methods: async def get_secret(self, path: str, version: int=None) -> Optional[Secret]
  Methods: async def set_secret(self, secret: Secret) -> bool
  Methods: async def delete_secret(self, path: str) -> bool
  Methods: async def force_delete_secret(self, path: str) -> bool
  Methods: async def restore_secret(self, path: str) -> bool
  Methods: async def list_secrets(self, path_prefix: str='') -> List[str]
  Methods: async def rotate_secret(self, path: str) -> bool
  Methods: async def list_versions(self, path: str) -> List[Dict]
